transcript: Before this calamity came upon us, you could not find anywhere a happier home than that created by the Indian woman.

transcript: The cut on his chest is still dripping blood. The ache of his overstrained eyes, even the soaring arena around him with the thousands of spectators, retrovialities not worth thinking about.
translation: उसकी छाती पर कटौती अभी भी खून टपक रहा है। उनकी आंखों की पीड़ा, यहां तक कि हजारों दर्शकों के साथ उनके आसपास की पीड़ा भी, retroviality के बारे में सोचने लायक नहीं है।

transcript: He was in reverie, sliding along the borders of consciousness.

transcript: And as soon as their parents had gone to sleep, he got up, put on his coat, and unbarring the back door went out.

transcript: I have these attacks at times.

transcript: Thanks to the heat of these residences, grass grows in the roof, which grass is carefully cut for hay.

transcript: I had long been wishing that an old-fashioned Christmas had been completely extinct before I had thought of adventuring in quest of one.

transcript: He was young. No spear had touched him. No poison lurked in his wine.

transcript: Before the two clergymen had got halfway down the steep path that led from the common-dance house to the flat on which the cottages of the doctor and chaplain were built, McElwain rejoined them.
translation: इससे पहले कि दो clergymen खड़ी पथ नीचे आधा रास्ता है कि आम नृत्य घर से फ्लैट जिस पर डॉक्टर और chaplain के कॉटेज बनाया गया था करने के लिए नेतृत्व किया था, मैकएल्वाइन उन्हें फिर से मिला।

transcript: I hope you'll like him better than the frostbitten old David you first knew and were kind enough to love.
translation: मुझे आशा है कि आप चाहते हैं कि वह फ्रॉस्टबाइटन पुराने डेविड से बेहतर है जिसे आप पहले जानते थे और प्यार करने के लिए काफी दयालु थे।

transcript: As her quiet figure appeared in the doorway, Sweetwater stole a glance at Mr. Greis.
translation: जैसा कि उसके शांत आंकड़े दरवाजे के रास्ते में दिखाई दिए, मीठे पानी ने श्री ग्रेस पर एक नज़र डाली।

transcript: My readers may imagine whether we felt inclined to laugh when the charming creature bathed us good night, thanking us all with perfect good faith.
translation: मेरे पाठक कल्पना कर सकते हैं कि क्या हम हंसते हुए महसूस करते हैं जब आकर्षक प्राणी हमें अच्छी रात से स्नान करता है, हमें सभी को सही विश्वास के साथ धन्यवाद देता है।
